text.message: Why would you give red 3 cards on their turn
No one else has done anything lol
dont even know who to steal
Blue do you want wheat port settle or are you coming down
Wood port is yours if you want
Yeah that’s what I want thanks
2 ore in hand for green here
Red i have to pop to stop green
I got knight just in case
I summon a 7 from the depths of h3ll
If I lose road we should watch out for red
Which either way looks like I’ll be in a road battle
Let’s see what you do here
i can trade back if you need for road
I kinda wanna let Green have it now
blue i said id trade back
not trying to crete bad blood
I soloed them and didn’t get a card either
I think we’re good on the road front now
Looks like I’m in last now
What was the point of that mono lol
Red I’m sorry you’re the Rob here
Think we fed blue too many cards
I think that gave me the game
Unless green has something up their sleeve
Yeah but I think he has rb anyways
